regions.name: top_navigation
regions.notes: Navigation labels, icons, currency, and selected states remain runtime-owned.

regions.name: title
regions.notes: The title remains localizable runtime text.

regions.name: language_options
regions.notes: Button shells may be generated, but all language names and selected state remain runtime-owned.

regions.name: confirm_button
regions.notes: Button plate may be generated, label remains runtime-owned.
